---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
Short description of the feature or improvement.

## Motivation
Why would this be useful? (e.g. workflow, performance, compatibility)

## Proposal
How could it work? (CLI flags, behavior, default values)

## Alternatives
Any alternative approaches or tools you've considered.

## Additional context
Optional: examples, use cases, or links to similar tools.
